title: Unicode Utility Functions
content:
This module provides utility functions for handling Unicode paths, primarily for filesystem compatibility, especially with macOS HFS Plus which uses decomposed UTF-8.

### Key Exports

*   **`decompose(path)`**: Normalizes a given path to its decomposed UTF-8 form (NFD). This is useful for ensuring consistent path comparisons, especially on systems like HFS+.
*   **`filesys_decode(path)`**: Attempts to decode a byte string path into a Unicode string. It prioritizes the system's filesystem encoding and then falls back to UTF-8. Returns `None` if decoding fails with all attempted encodings.
*   **`try_encode(string, enc)`**: Attempts to encode a Unicode string into a specified encoding. Returns `None` if a `UnicodeEncodeError` occurs.
